form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Most recently 4th of 8 at Gulfstream Park All Weather on March 20 over 1710m, 6 len behind Stella Bionda with 54.5kg at $10.80. Before that won by 5 len at Gulfstream Park All Weather February 12 over 1673m defeating Soda with 55.5kg at $9.90. Can turn things around.

form.formComment: Comes off a 42 day let-up. Last start 5th of 7 at Tampa Bay Downs on March 1 over 1408m, 11 len behind Prancin Inthe Dark with 54kg at $21.70. The race before that second last in a small field at Tampa Bay Downs on February 12 over 1207m, 12 len behind Fly Life with 54kg at $21.20. Will need to improve many lengths to feature.
